extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters into criminal and tax categories, with 2 criminal cases against the Company, 1 tax proceeding against the Company, and 2 criminal cases against Directors; there are no “By” rows, no subsidiary rows, and no separate statutory/regulatory enforcement column, so criminal, regulatory and tax are kept separate. The quantified group amount against the Company/subsidiaries is the Company tax amount of ₹2.38 million; the criminal amounts are “Not quantifiable,” and Director matters are excluded from the aggregate. No contingent-liabilities table or stated contingent-liabilities total is disclosed in the provided risk section; the ₹104.04 million capital-commitments table is not contingent liabilities. The concentration disclosure is company-wide top-10 customer revenue for Fiscal 2021, the most recent full fiscal year, measured as 47.90% of total revenue from operations; no company-wide top-5 percentage is provided. Litigation amounts use ₹ million, converted to crore at ₹10 million per crore: ₹2.38 million ÷ 10 = ₹0.238 crore.
